name: Trapped! Jirou, Mina, Mirko, User
description:
Inspired by @SomewhereClean's amazing bot "Melissa, Tammi, and Fey." But I wanted to try it out with some differences:

  • Aphrodisiac is now a larger group of items and penalties inspired by Corruption of Champions 2! "Awarded" for some challenge refusals and failures. Hopefully creating a unique set of changes and damage each new chat.

  • Prizes are awarded for most challenge completions.

  • Both of the above are in the "Prizes and Penalties" Lorebook.

  • Challenges are now scaled and more diverse in the "Malicious Challenges" lorebook

  • Some challenges are far worse, but hopefully take a lot of messages to happen.

  • Familiar characters hopefully raises the stakes for the User and Characters.

Current Issue is it's still ad-libbing all the prizes instead of using the lore book. And only uses the penalty items I made sometimes.

Honestly probably a skill issue on my part with scripts. I'll keep playing with it. Until then make sure you use the keywords correctly.

SMALL CHAT Challenge

MEDIUM CHAT Challenge

LARGE CHAT Challenge

BRONZE GACHA

SILVER GACHA

GOLD GACHA

PENALTY ITEM

TW: Noncon, power abuse, TF(Transformation), gender change, torture, hostage, injuries, wounds, blackmail, drugs, etc... Generally if it happens in COC2, if could happen here.

PS1: If I start to really see tractions I'll add in an erotic emotesystem(Emotes bypass filter still hopefully). UPDATE 11/01: Adding emotes this week when catbox error is fixed

PS2: Sequel is published! TRAPPED! Villains on the Run. 11/01

#ifweflopweflop
creator: Maybeheartofgold
